response.original_title: Is the Wells Fargo Active Cash Card hard to get? [Move→To→Next]
response.overview: Applying +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] for a premium rewards card often brings up concerns about approval odds. Many +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] people want to know the credit requirements for the Wells Fargo Active Cash. Generally, +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] this card is geared toward applicants with good to excellent credit scores. While +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] not the hardest card to get, it does require a solid financial history. Understanding +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] the criteria can help you prepare a successful application for this card. Credit Score and Income Requirements Most +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] successful applicants have a FICO score of 700 or higher when they apply. While +1 (877)(513)-6142 [Direct Call] some get approved with slightly lower scores, a higher number increases your odds.
